creator: rozhuk.im@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Alexander Vereeken from comment #4)

You can try replace 4 with 256 (256mb) and see is something change.
In my case game hang for some time before error, I suspect there is some infinite recursion inside and it take long time to consume 256mb.

Also my game was x64 and my system is x64 so wine port build without any extra actions, hope your tests handle this.
